text: Literally everybody knows about “artificial intelligence” – how Poles perceive it? The title of this article does not express some irony or at least incomprehension. Our aim is to provide a review of several opinion polls presented in various internet sources and assessing the public opinion in Poland towards artificial intelligence. Thanks to a systematic analysis of on-line materials, which are freely available, we managed to gather 12 independent studies regarding artificial intelligence public opinion in Poland that were conducted in the years 2017–2023. In view of the applied methodology, after analysing the research material, the following conclusions could be formulated: – regarding the comprehension of artificial intelligence as a phenomenon; – regarding the experience of human relationship with technological devices; – concerning the degree and extent of acceptance of intelligent devices by society; – as regards substituting human work by technical means, especially in primary sectors of the national economy; and finally – as concerns the occurrence of confusion, being one of the essential features of public opinion towards this issue. Taking all the mentioned facts into account leads to the conclusion that Poles begin to understand to what extent the emergence of artificial intelligence is crucial to the benefit of the society, yet they still do not fully comprehend how it functions. This study proves that time is necessary for the social acceptance of these advanced technologies. Eventually, AI is going to occupy a permanent place in everyday life, which will necessarily contribute to an altered perception of artificial intelligence.
